zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de la Haye於1382年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾金努爾時，她的父親Sir Thomas de la Haye 7th Lord of Erroll40歲，母親Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland36歲。她於大約1400年與Sir William Hay, Laird of Locherworth and Yester結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1451年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾也斯特吉福德享年69歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾也斯特吉福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de la Haye于1382年出生在英国苏格兰培爾金努爾时，她的父亲Sir Thomas de la Haye 7th Lord of Erroll40岁，母亲Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland36岁。她于大约1400年与Sir William Hay, Laird of Locherworth and Yester结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1451年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾也斯特吉福德享年69岁，埋葬在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾也斯特吉福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Haye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Helmut, Willi.

North German, East Frisian, and Dutch: from a personal name, Frisian Hajo, ancient Germanic Haio; or from a short form of the female name Hadewig, composed of the elements hadu ‘battle, strife’ + wīg ‘war’.
German: variant of   Hey   4, 5.

variants.name: Deshayes
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived by an enclosure, from the plural of Old French haye ‘hedge’ (see Haye and Hayes ), with fused preposition and definite article des ‘from the’; or a habitational name denoting someone from Les Hayes, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Deshaies .

variants.name: Hayenga
meanings: East Frisian: patronymic from the personal name Hajo (see Haye 1). It is formed with the suffix -enga, a variant of -inga (from the patronymic suffix -ing and genitive plural ending -a).

variants.name: Hey
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Hay  .
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized (or archaic) and Flemish, of Heij, a topographic name for someone who lived on a heath, Dutch hei, heide.
German: metonymic occupational name for a grower or mower of grass, from Middle High German höu ‘grass, hay’.

variants.name: Hayen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse.  German Heinz, Wilhelm.
Flemish, East Frisian, and North German: patronymic from   Haye   1.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

variants.name: Alys
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alice .

variants.name: Alis
meanings: equivalent of Alice .

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de la Haye was born in 1382, in Kinnoul, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas de la Haye 7th Lord of Erroll, was 40 and her mother, Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland, was 36. She married Sir William Hay, Laird of Locherworth and Yester about 1400. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1451, in Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 69, and was buried in Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de la Haye est née en 1382, à Kinnoul, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas de la Haye 7th Lord of Erroll, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Hay, Laird of Locherworth and Yester environ 1400. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1451, à Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de la Haye 1382 in Kinnoul, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas de la Haye 7th Lord of Erroll 40 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland 36. Sie hat um 1400 Sir William Hay, Laird of Locherworth and Yester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1451 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland und wurde in Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de la Haye è nata il nel 1382 nel Kinnoul, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Thomas de la Haye 7th Lord of Erroll, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Hay, Laird of Locherworth and Yester circa 1400. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1451, nel Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de la Hayeが1382年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアキノウルで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de la Haye 7th Lord of Errollは40歳，母Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotlandは36歳であった。約1400年にSir William Hay, Laird of Locherworth and Yesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1451年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアイエスターギフォードで69歳で死去し，スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアイエスターギフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de la Haye(이)가 1382년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 킨우에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas de la Haye 7th Lord of Erroll(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1400년 Sir William Hay, Laird of Locherworth and Yester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1451년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 예스터 지퍼드에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 예스터 지퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de la Haye nasceu em 1382, em Kinnoul, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas de la Haye 7th Lord of Erroll, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Hay, Laird of Locherworth and Yester aproximadamente 1400. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1451, em Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ru.Yester Castle, Gifford, East Lothian, Sc: иестир кастл, иестир, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de la Haye родилась в 1382 г. в местности кинноул, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas de la Haye 7th Lord of Erroll было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Hay, Laird of Locherworth and Yester около 1400 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1451 г. в местности гиффорд, иестир, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности гиффорд, иестир, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de la Haye nació en 1382, en Kinnoul, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas de la Haye 7th Lord of Erroll, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Sir William Hay, Laird of Locherworth and Yester aproximadamente 1400. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1451, en Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.
